basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Dantewada School Academic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: A 3-year Undergraduate Degree + 2-year Postgraduate Degree, OR A 4-year Undergraduate Program, OR An Integrated Undergraduate + Postgraduate Program. Preference: M.A. Education or M.Ed. (Full-time or blended executive mode). Distance mode qualifications are not eligible.
qualification.details: School Academic Consultant: Qualifications: A 3-year Undergraduate Degree + 2-year Postgraduate Degree, OR A 4-year Undergraduate Program, OR An Integrated Undergraduate + Postgraduate Program. Preference: M.A. Education or M.Ed. (Full-time or blended executive mode). Distance mode qualifications are not eligible. Experience: Experience in International schools or reputed NGOs working in education, Experience working in PMUs or as consultants with SCERTs, Samagra Shiksha, or Education Directorates, Experience in large-scale education transformation programs, Deep understanding of pedagogy and school education, Strong communication, leadership, and documentation skills, Fluency in English and Hindi.

salary_details.pay_scale: Remuneration will be growth-oriented and based on the candidate's current salary, qualifications, experience, and suitability for the role.
salary_details.details: Remuneration will be growth-oriented and based on the candidate's current salary, qualifications, experience, and suitability for the role.

selection_process: Stage 1: Shortlisting (Based on Resume/CV and Statement of Purpose) Stage 2: Online Interview (Shortlisted candidates only) Stage 3: Final Round at Dantewada (In-person interaction and school visit. 3rd AC travel reimbursed)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Samagra Shiksha Dantewada School Academic Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Samagra Shiksha Dantewada School Academic Consultant Job 2026 Notificat

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Samagra Shiksha Dantewada School Academic Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the School Academic Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 3-year Undergraduate Degree + 2-year Postgraduate Degree, or a 4-year Undergraduate Program, or an Integrated Undergraduate + Postgraduate Program. M.A. Education or M.Ed. is preferred, but distance mode qualifications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the School Academic Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves three stages: initial shortlisting based on resume and statement of purpose, followed by an online interview, and a final in-person round at Dantewada.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for the Samagra Shiksha Dantewada School Academic Consultant position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply via email by sending their updated resume and statement of purpose to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the School Academic Consultant position?
faq.answer: The remuneration is designed to be growth-oriented and will be determined based on the candidate's current salary, qualifications, experience, and overall suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is preferred for the School Academic Consultant role?
faq.answer: Preference is given to candidates with experience in international schools, reputed NGOs in education, PMUs, or as consultants with SCERTs, Samagra Shiksha, or Education Directorates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the subject line required for the email application?
faq.answer: The subject line for the email application must be: "Application - School Academic Consultant - Aastha Vidya Mandir - [Your Name]".

faq.question: Q9. Will travel expenses be reimbursed for the final selection round?
faq.answer: Yes, 3rd AC travel expenses will be reimbursed for the final round of selection, which involves an in-person interaction and school visit at Dantewada.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
